title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and backend logic with Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design within the Archon framework. The workflow chains planning, design, and integration steps to rapidly produce visually polished frontend applications.
